     The Numbers Business Report

Isle of Dogs (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,015,231Details
International Box Office $26,641,971
Worldwide Box Office $58,657,202
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,823,899
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,968,728
Total $4,792,627
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of Atari Kobayashi, 12-year-old ward to corrupt Mayor Kobayashi. When, by Executive Decree, all the canine pets of Megasaki City are exiled to a vast garbage-dump called Trash Island, Atari sets off alone in a miniature Junior-Turbo Prop and flies across the river in search of his bodyguard-dog, Spots. There, with the assistance of a pack of newly-found mongrel friends, he begins an epic journey that will decide the fate and future of the entire Prefecture.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,620,294 (5.1% of total gross)
Legs:5.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:27 opening theaters/1,947 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $42,030,968

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2018 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
April 13th, 2018 (Expands Wide) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: March 30th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
April 13th, 2018 (Wide), released as Isle Of Dogs (Australia)
April 13th, 2018 (Wide) (France)
April 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
April 20th, 2018 (Wide), released as Köpek Adasi (Turkey)
Video Release: July 17th, 2018 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic elements and some violent images.
(Rating bulletin 2514 (Cert #51283), 2/14/2018)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Intertitle, Prologue, Split Screen, Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: Japan
Plot point: Coming of Age, Dysfunctional Family, Government Corruption, Missing Pet, Non-Chronological, Orphan, Political Assassination, Quarantine, Research Scientist, Separated at Birth, Talking Animals, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Epidemic
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Time period setting: 2030s, Near Future
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Stop-Motion Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox Searchlight Pictures, Indian Paintbrush, American Empirical
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

The story of Atari Kobayashi, 12-year-old ward to corrupt Mayor Kobayashi. When, by Executive Decree, all the canine pets of Megasaki City are exiled to a vast garbage-dump called Trash Island, Atari sets off alone in a miniature Junior-Turbo Prop and flies across the river in search of his bodyguard-dog, Spots. There, with the assistance of a pack of newly-found mongrel friends, he begins an epic journey that will decide the fate and future of the entire Prefecture.
